tasks.description: Implement routing guard to filter non-coding tasks
tasks.context: Add task classifier in backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts before MiniMax dispatch. Check task.type and task.context for keywords (ADR, documentation, analysis, research). Route coding tasks to MiniMax, others to placeholder or reject. Return classification decision with reason.

Wire backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts into orchestrator routing decision. Call validator before MiniMax dispatch. If complexity > threshold or non-code detected, block assignment. Log rejection reason for sprint analytics.

tasks.description: Enforce file path validation before dispatch
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, validate task.deliverables.code paths exist in project tree before sending to MiniMax. Check against known file list. Reject tasks with non-existent paths or empty code deliverables array. Prevent hallucinated file references.

tasks.description: Add quality gate check to orchestrator config
tasks.context: Update backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts to enable strict validation mode. Set maxTasksPerAgent, requireFileValidation, blockNonCodingTasks flags. Integrate with backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts thresholds. Enforce >80% auto-approval target.

tasks.description: Fix orchestrator to reject multi-file tasks
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts dispatch logic, count deliverables.code array length. If >1 file, reject task before MiniMax assignment. Each task must target exactly one file per system prompt rules. Log rejection with task ID and file count.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add structured logging before each MiniMax dispatch. Log task.type, file count, complexity score, routing decision, validation results. Use backend/src/lib/logger.ts. Enable sprint post-mortem analysis of approval rates.
